title: Category Strategy Analyst
core_responsibilities: Analyze market demand and competitive dynamics to develop category strategies and product portfolios; coordinate procurement and supply chain resources to optimize product structure and inventory efficiency.
Research industry trends and consumer behavior to design pricing strategies and promotional campaigns; enhance product competitiveness and achieve profitability targets.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams across the supply chain to optimize product scheduling and launch plans, ensuring efficient inventory turnover and operational agility.
Establish a data monitoring framework to analyze sales performance, cost structures, and profit margins; provide actionable insights for decision-making and drive data-driven operational precision.
Leverage industry best practices to pioneer new collaborative scenarios and innovative business models, expanding market share and strengthening industry leadership.
recommended_emphasis: Highlight product portfolio gap analysis experience at GRG Banking (6 product lines, competitive benchmarking shaping roadmap)
Emphasize competitive intelligence and market segmentation work (ECE Group, IoT/GRG roles)
Showcase data monitoring and KPI framework design skills (Power BI PL-300, campaign analytics, budget dashboards)
Leverage e-commerce funnel analytics at Moli Media and cross-border retail context (Joybuy/JD Europe) to signal domain fit
Stress cross-functional coordination experience (Hapag-Lloyd agile delivery, HSBC PMO bridging technical and C-level)
Add any pricing or inventory exposure (even indirect, e.g., trade fair ROI, budget variance) to partially address pricing strategy gaps

company_info.size_raw: Ranked 44th on the Fortune Global 500; China's largest retailer by revenue; serving over 600 million annual active customers
